UD JURY TRIALS

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-09-2012 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Judge Ronald Evans Quidachay; Clerk: K. Liu ; Not Reported. (D501)

Appearances:
Plaintiff James Whelan is present. Represented by Donald McSweeney.
Attorney Cindy Lee appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant Mahnaz Saberi is present.
Attorney Elle Lewis representing the defendant through limited scope.

The Judge Pro Tem Dennis Hyde, litigants and counsel confer in Dept. 502A , for settlement discussions. This case settled. The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was filed. The trial date of May-14-2012 is vacated. (501/JPT)
